cabin: Flat-floor midsize cabin; stands ~5 ft 8 in.

cabin: Stand-up super-midsize cabin; coast-to-coast capable in many seasons.

cabin: Midsize cabin; classic Honeywell power, proven in fleet and charter.

cabin: Large-cabin, twin aisle; long ferry but strong short-field pedigree (series-dependent).

cabin: Light jet cabin; best for small groups.
typical_mission: Regional US / short Europe sectors; thin routes with runway constraints.

cabin: Light jet cabin; efficient owner-operator platform.
typical_mission: Short-to-medium business sectors; strong economics for 4–6 pax.

typical_mission: Fast domestic sectors; good fit when speed matters more than cabin height.
